label: funnel-mobile-0702

steps.script: () => { var q=function(s){return document.querySelector(s);}; var t=document.body?document.body.innerText:''; var lt=t.toLowerCase(); var atc=q('button[name=add]')||q("form[action*='/cart/add'] [type=submit]"); var atcRect=null; if(atc){var r=atc.getBoundingClientRect(); atcRect={top:Math.round(r.top),bottom:Math.round(r.bottom),w:Math.round(r.width),h:Math.round(r.height)};} var priceEl=q('.price__regular .price-item')||q('.price-item--regular')||q('[data-price]')||q('.price'); var optEls=document.querySelectorAll('variant-radios input, fieldset input[type=radio], .product-form__input input, select[name*=option] option'); var opts=[]; for(var i=0;i<optEls.length&&i<40;i++){var e=optEls[i]; opts.push({v:(e.value||e.textContent||'').trim(), disabled:!!e.disabled||e.getAttribute('aria-disabled')==='true', checked:!!e.checked});} var img=q('.product__media img')||q('product-media img')||q('.product img'); return {url:location.href,title:document.title,hasProductForm:!!q("form[action*='/cart/add']"),priceText:priceEl?priceEl.textContent.trim():null,zeroPriceInBody:t.indexOf('$0.00')>-1,soldOutInBody:lt.indexOf('sold out')>-1,firstPiecePromise:lt.indexOf('first piece promise')>-1,shippingClaimPresent:(lt.indexOf('free shipping')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('2 days')>-1),atc:atc?{exists:true,disabled:!!atc.disabled||atc.getAttribute('aria-disabled')==='true',text:(atc.innerText||atc.value||'').trim(),rect:atcRect,visibleInViewport:atcRect?(atcRect.top<window.innerHeight&&atcRect.bottom>0):null}:{exists:false},optionCount:opts.length,options:opts,hero:img?{src:img.currentSrc||img.src,complete:img.complete,naturalW:img.naturalWidth}:null,viewport:{w:window.innerWidth,h:window.innerHeight}}; }

() => { var q=function(s){return document.querySelector(s);}; var a=q('button[name=add]')||q("form[action*='/cart/add'] [type=submit]"); if(!a) return {clicked:false,reason:'no ATC'}; a.click(); return {clicked:true,text:(a.innerText||a.value||'').trim()}; }

() => { var q=function(s){return document.querySelector(s);}; var t=document.body?document.body.innerText:''; var co=q('[name=checkout]')||q("a[href='/checkout']")||q('.cart__checkout-button')||q('#checkout'); var coRect=null,covered=false,visible=false; if(co){var r=co.getBoundingClientRect(); coRect={top:Math.round(r.top),bottom:Math.round(r.bottom),w:Math.round(r.width),h:Math.round(r.height)}; covered=(r.bottom>window.innerHeight+2)||(r.top<0)||(r.width===0); visible=(r.top<window.innerHeight&&r.bottom>0&&r.width>0); var cx=Math.round(r.left+r.width/2),cy=Math.round(r.top+r.height/2); var topEl=document.elementFromPoint(cx,cy); var onTop=!!(topEl&&(topEl===co||co.contains(topEl)||topEl.contains(co))); coRect.centerHitsButton=onTop;} var items=[]; var nodes=document.querySelectorAll('.cart-item, .cart__item, tr.cart-item'); for(var i=0;i<nodes.length&&i<6;i++){items.push(nodes[i].innerText.trim());} var si=t.toLowerCase().indexOf('subtotal'); return {url:location.href,subtotalSnippet:si>-1?t.substring(si,si+40):null,lineItems:items,checkoutButton:co?{exists:true,disabled:!!co.disabled,text:(co.innerText||co.value||'').trim(),rect:coRect,visibleInViewport:visible,offscreenOrCovered:covered}:{exists:false},viewport:{w:window.innerWidth,h:window.innerHeight}}; }

() => { var t=document.body?document.body.innerText:''; var lt=t.toLowerCase(); function snip(w){var i=lt.indexOf(w); return i<0?null:t.substring(i,i+90);} return {finalUrl:location.href,title:document.title,looksBotBlocked:(lt.indexOf('just a moment')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('checking your browser')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('verify you are human')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('attention required')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('captcha')>-1),shippingSnippet:snip('shipping'),dutiesSnippet:snip('duties')||snip('import')||snip('tax'),payment:{shopPay:lt.indexOf('shop pay')>-1,paypal:lt.indexOf('paypal')>-1,applePay:lt.indexOf('apple pay')>-1,googlePay:lt.indexOf('google pay')>-1,card:(lt.indexOf('card number')>-1)||(lt.indexOf('credit card')>-1),afterpay:lt.indexOf('afterpay')>-1},errorSnippet:snip('error')||snip('unable')||snip('problem'),bodyLen:t.length}; }

() => { var q=function(s){return document.querySelector(s);}; var t=document.body?document.body.innerText:''; var lt=t.toLowerCase(); var atc=q('button[name=add]')||q("form[action*='/cart/add'] [type=submit]"); var priceEl=q('.price__regular .price-item')||q('.price-item--regular')||q('[data-price]')||q('.price'); var optEls=document.querySelectorAll('variant-radios input, fieldset input[type=radio], .product-form__input input, select[name*=option] option'); var opts=[]; for(var i=0;i<optEls.length&&i<40;i++){var e=optEls[i]; opts.push({v:(e.value||e.textContent||'').trim(), disabled:!!e.disabled||e.getAttribute('aria-disabled')==='true', checked:!!e.checked});} return {url:location.href,title:document.title,hasProductForm:!!q("form[action*='/cart/add']"),priceText:priceEl?priceEl.textContent.trim():null,zeroPriceInBody:t.indexOf('$0.00')>-1,soldOutInBody:lt.indexOf('sold out')>-1,firstPiecePromise:lt.indexOf('first piece promise')>-1,atc:atc?{exists:true,disabled:!!atc.disabled}:{exists:false},optionCount:opts.length,options:opts,viewport:{w:window.innerWidth,h:window.innerHeight}}; }
